content.en:
The point is, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor still doesn't know how he was discovered!

"Run!"

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor knew that he couldn't defeat Ye Tian in his current state, so he could only choose to escape.

However, his Void Treasure Lotus had already exploded, and the last trace of the Void Treasure Lotus Origin had long since dissipated.

As a result, he now only has the treasure of a regular escape.

But at this moment, he used it, and it didn't have any effect.

Under the shroud of Ye Tian's endless black domain, the strength of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor was suppressed very much, and his speed was also limited, and many methods were difficult to deploy.

"Damn, if the Dao Fruit is still there, I can still use the Yuan Dao, even if I can only cast a trace of the Yuan Dao, I can smash your domain!"

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor said angrily.

"Your Excellency really wants to fight with me, I used to be a half-step eightfold ancestor, even if I have lost the Dao Fruit now, but if I am desperate, it will not be difficult to die with you!"

Black Silence Dao Ancestor said.

"Then you can try it!"

Ye Tian said indifferently.

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor's eyes became firm, and he directly swallowed a black fruit during the battle, and the aura on his body became extremely powerful.

Bang!!!!!

Endless black light enveloped this boundary, enveloping countless creatures in this realm in an instant, devouring them, and also devouring Ye Tian.

"Let's die together!"

The voice of the Black Silent Dao Ancestor resounded throughout the district.

The terrifying annihilation force enveloped this boundary, and in an instant, the boundary of this area disappeared, the silent black sea was shattered and cracked, and the huge territory was turned into a forbidden area.

Airplanes!!!!

One after another Extreme Dao will converged outside this area, and soon turned into a crippled figure, which was the Black Silence Dao Ancestor.

"This time it's a big loss, the flesh is shattered, only a part of the Extreme Dao will remains, it will take a long time to recover to the half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, if you want to restore the Dao Fruit, it will take even longer years!" said the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor helplessly.

Fortunately, having killed the enemy, he must flee immediately.

Airplanes!

Sumeru Daozhu protected him and quickly left here with him.

Otherwise, after a long time, other Dao Ancestors will come, and it will be difficult for him to escape.

But suddenly, the silent Black Sea Void in front of him distorted, and a figure stared at him.

"It's you, it's impossible, how could you not be dead!! just now I broke out an attack comparable to the powerful Sevenfold Ancestor, which annihilated you in an instant, you can't still be alive!!"

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor was stunned, completely unable to believe the fact that Ye Tian was still alive.

However, Ye Tian was indeed killed by him just now, but what died was only a copy body.

And he had already let another copy body rush over as soon as possible, after all, he knew that the Black Silence Dao Ancestor was not simple, even if he no longer cultivated, but if he worked hard, he might not be able to survive.

Therefore, one more replica body is one more hope.

Now, the decision was right.

"Black Silence Dao Ancestor, you still fall!"

Ye Tian shattered the body of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor with one blow, and the endless black domain shrouded it, shattering the Extreme Dao will of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor.

As the will of the Extreme Dao was shattered, the aura of the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor became weaker and weaker.

In the end, the Black Silent Dao Ancestor fell and died.

Then, Ye Tian took the Black Silence Dao Ancestor's Sumeru Dao Bead and the treasure resources on his body, and then left here.

......

Not long after, a Dao Ancestor came here.

When they saw that the boundary of this community had been shattered, they shivered one by one and fled quickly.

In their opinion, it was highly likely that this was the result of one or several Sevenfold Ancestors.

So, they don't dare to probe, they don't even dare to find out.

As for what happened, they didn't want to know!

Archean Plains boundary.

Ye Tian is back.

"This bead should be to hide the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor, so that the Hanhai District Boundary can't find his treasure!"

Ye Tian quickly refined this bead and knew its usefulness.

"Sumeru Dao Bead, the original ancient treasure, conceals the aura, conceals the body, shields the detection, deduction and other effects......"

Ye Tian's expression was shocked, this is a good thing!

After entering the Hanhai District Boundary, he naturally had such an amazing treasure of the Primordial Ancient Treasure, even if it was the entire Hanhai District Boundary, there were not many Primordial Ancient Treasures.

The birth of a primordial ancient treasure was even enough to cause a half-step eightfold primordial ancestor to fight.

Unexpectedly, such a good thing would fall into his hands.

And there are still many resources inside this primordial ancient treasure, but unfortunately, it is different from what Ye Tian imagined, and the number is not very large.

Of course, there are also some relatively high-level resources, which should be useful for the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor or Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and they cannot be used now.

But even so, Ye Tian felt that the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor was too poor.

He knew that the Black Silence Dao Ancestor had swallowed many community realms, how many Dao Ancestors had to be in those community realms, and how many resources they had, how could it be so little.

"There is only one possibility, that is, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor swallowed all those resources, it's a waste!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

If those resources hadn't been swallowed, they would have been his!

"Don't be too greedy, these resources alone are enough for me to cultivate for a long time, and I can also exchange some of these resources for the resources I need!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent a replica body to pass through the truncated black mountain again, to the Hanhai Boundary, and send these resources to the replicant body of the Hanhai Boundary.

As for the Sumeru Dao Bead, let's stay at the boundary of the primeval realm.

......

Hanhai Palace.

Soon, they received the suspicious news of the appearance of the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor.

Before, when Hanhai Palace sent some Sevenfold Ancestors to pass through the Cut Black Mountain and go to another boundary, it found a few half-step Sevenfold Ancestors and left a special way of communication.

If you find any signs of the Black Silent Dao Ancestor, contact them immediately.

Soon, several half-step eightfold ancestors of Hanhai Palace came to the other end of the Truncated Black Mountain, and soon came to the place where the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor fell.

"There is a community boundary here that has been annihilated, and the time of annihilation is not long, and you can also learn a little trace of the past in a special way, it should be the Black Silence Dao Ancestor's shot. "

A half-step Yae Origin Ancestor said.

Immediately, they dispatched the Hanhai Boundary Map, and although they could not find the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, they had the hope of finding some traces.

But this time, after urging the exploration and deduction of the original ancient treasure of the Hanhai Boundary Map, an astonishing result was obtained!!

"What, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor has fallen!"

This is easy to speculate, after all, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor has fallen, so naturally it is impossible to block their deduction.

"Who did it?"

Several other half-step Yae Ancestors were shocked.

"I can't calculate it, that Dao Ancestor must have refined the Sumeru Dao Bead, and we can't deduce it. However, the fall of the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor is a good thing. Otherwise, if we really let the Black Silence Dao Ancestor recover, comprehend the Extreme Yuan Dao in the future, and step into the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, we will definitely take revenge on our Hanhai Palace and the Hanhai District Boundary!"

"Forget it, it doesn't matter who killed the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, let's just let this matter pass! Maybe a certain Yae Origin Ancestor couldn't look past it, so he came over directly to find the Black Silence Dao Ancestor and killed him!"

Immediately.

These half-step eightfold ancestors returned to Hanhai Palace and announced the fact that the Black Silence Dao Ancestor had fallen.

This news announced that the entire Hanhai District boundary had completely returned to normal.
